title: HOUSING SUPPORT SERVICES - 211info
text: OREGON HOUSING AND COMMUNITY SERVICES HOUSING SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists with rent and utility assistance (electric, gas, heating fuel, sewer, trash, or water), down payment for a home, or financial counseling, which may include household budgeting, eviction protection, and legal aid. Rent assistance participants must pay 30% of their income towards rent. Assistance is available for 24 months or until the program’s funding is entirely spent. Eligibility: -Household affected by the wildfires and straight-line winds of 2020, which include the 242, Almeda, Archie Creek, Beachie Creek, Echo Mountain, Holiday Farm, Lionshead, Riverside, and South Obenchain fires -At the time of the disasters, the applicant lived in an impacted county -Current household income at or below 120% of Area Medium Income (AMI) -Rent/Utility Assistance: Monthly housing costs exceed 30% of applicant's household’s adjusted gross monthly income or housing is not decent, safe, or sanitary and the cost of housing that meets occupancy standards would exceed 30% of household's income Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 250-0938 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 250-0938 Toll-free (877) 510-6800 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: -Proof of income, address, property damage verification, and monthly housing costs -If applicable: proof of other assistance received and power of attorney AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Douglas, Jackson, Klamath, Lane, Lincoln, Linn, and Marion Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance * Disaster/Emergency Issues Gas Service Payment Assistance * Disaster/Emergency Issues Heating Fuel Payment Assistance * Disaster/Emergency Issues Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing * Disaster/Emergency Issues Homebuyer/Home Purchase Counseling * Disabilities Issues * Disaster/Emergency Issues Rent Payment Assistance * Disaster/Emergency Issues Sewer Service Payment Assistance * Disaster/Emergency Issues Trash/Recycling Service Payment Assistance * Disaster/Emergency Issues Water Service Payment Assistance * Disaster/Emergency Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - LOW INCOME HOME ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM DISASTER SERVICES - HOMEOWNER ASSISTANCE AND RECONSTRUCTION PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - MANUFACTURED AND MARINA COMMUNITIES RESOURCE CENTER HOUSING/SHELTER - OREGON EVICTION PREVENTION RAPID RESPONSE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
